title: Define staged optimization protocol for regression, benchmark, and random evaluations
description:
## Summary
Define the staged optimization protocol that combines fixed deterministic checks and random generalization checks.

## Deliverables
- Specify the role of the small fixed regression set versus the larger fixed benchmark set.
- Define when deterministic checks run, when random checks run, and when stronger multi-random confirmation is required.
- Define how sample size, time range, and random-run count are chosen for the workflow.

## Notes
This task defines the operational protocol; it should stay aligned with the fixed-dataset role model.
